outfit_info.outfit_description: This outfit showcases a relaxed, contemporary streetwear aesthetic. An oversized black tee is paired with loose-fitting, wide-leg light blue jeans. A distressed grey hoodie is casually tied around the waist, adding an effortless layer and urban flair. Chunky black sneakers complete the comfortable and stylish ensemble.

model_attributes.body: The model possesses a lean and athletic physique, standing with a casual and poised demeanor.
model_attributes.pose: The model stands in a straightforward, relaxed pose with hands naturally positioned at the sides.
model_attributes.background: A minimalist, plain light grey studio background offers a clean and unobtrusive setting.
